CustomField.description: Product qualification timeline used by the guided selling process.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used by guided selling to match products to the customer's implementation timeline.
CustomField.label: Timeline

value.fullName: We need to be live ASAP (days/weeks)
value.label: We need to be live ASAP (days/weeks)

value.fullName: We have a few months to plan
value.label: We have a few months to plan

value.fullName: No hard deadline - we're exploring options
value.label: No hard deadline - we're exploring options
